_comment: Tidbit content pack. The app rotates through these and falls back to them when live data is unavailable. Each entry: id (unique), category, text (full sentence), and optional season_window (date range YYYY-MM-DD..YYYY-MM-DD), weight (rotation priority 1-10, default 5). Target growth: 150+ entries before parent debut.

entries.text: October 30, 2019: Howie Kendrick rang the foul pole in the seventh inning of Game 7. The Nationals won the World Series. Still the only one.
The 2019 parade started at the Capitol and ended at Nationals Park. Stephen Strasburg held the trophy. Everyone in DC took a Monday off.
Gerardo Parra changed his walk-up song to 'Baby Shark' for his daughter in June 2019. The team caught fire and never looked back.
Stephen Strasburg holds the Nats franchise record for strikeouts. He retired in 2024 as the Game 6 World Series MVP.
Anthony Rendon hit three home runs and drove in ten runs against the Mets in April 2017. Three. Ten. In one game.
Ryan Zimmerman holds the franchise record for career hits, home runs, and walk-offs. They call him Mr. National for good reason.
Ryan Zimmerman was the Nationals' very first draft pick in 2005, the same year the franchise moved from Montreal.
The Nationals were the Montreal Expos from 1969 to 2004. The curly W honors the original Senators, not the Expos.
Nationals Park sits where the Anacostia River meets the Potomac watershed. The cherry blossoms in section 137 bloom every April.
Nationals Park seats 41,313 people. The lower bowl gets sun in the afternoon; the upper deck gets the breeze.
The Red Porch in right-center field is one of the best places in MLB to watch a game. Home runs land just past the bullpens.
The Nats have looked sharp lately. Let's see if they can keep it rolling.
Tough stretch. Tonight's a fresh start. That's why they play 162.
Home game tonight at Nationals Park. The grounds crew has the diamond dialed in.
On the road tonight. Different ballpark, same hope.
James Wood is twenty-two. He hits the ball harder than almost anyone in baseball. The future started already.
CJ Abrams' sprint speed is in the 95th percentile of all of MLB. Watch his first step out of the box.
MacKenzie Gore was the third overall pick in 2017. The Nats got him in the Soto trade. The fastball is real.
Dylan Crews was the second overall pick in 2023. He hits, he runs, he throws. The complete package.
Gerardo Parra's daughter picked 'Baby Shark' as his walk-up song. The whole stadium learned the hand motions.
Ryan Zimmerman's foundation has raised millions for MS research, named for his mother.
Screech the bald eagle has been the Nats mascot since 2005. He turns the same age as the franchise every year.
Nationals Park is roughly league-average for run scoring. The right-center power alley is the friendliest spot.
The NL East has been won by every team in it since 2017. Parity, finally.
James Wood's average exit velocity puts him in elite company - Judge, Stanton, Schwarber tier.
